x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Device registration in DEX establishes the endpoint population that AI diagnostic capabilities analyze. Without sufficient registered devices, DEX AI has no data to pattern-match against for proactive issue detection and root cause analysis.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function(checkDef, dateFilter) { var ga = new GlideAggregate("dex_device"); ga.addAggregate("COUNT"); ga.query(); var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; var actualValue = count + " devices registered in DEX"; if (count >= 100) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: count + " devices registered in DEX. AI diagnostic capabilities have a broad device population to analyze for patterns and anomalies." }; } else if (count >= 10) { return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + count + " devices registered in DEX (target: 100+). Expand Desktop Assistant deployment to more endpoints." }; } else { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + count + " devices registered in DEX. Deploy the DEX Desktop Assistant to managed endpoints first." }; }})()
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Deploy the DEX Desktop Assistant (sn_dex_desktop) to endpoint devices. Devices must register with the DEX platform before telemetry collection can begin. Target: all managed endpoints registered.
